narrative:
Silver Lake Vill A (precinct in Summit County) has 494 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 25.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.7%, a modest Republican lean of 3.6 percentage points.
